name: Intent Engine
responsibility: Extracts intent from agent prompts/outputs using a Strategy Pattern (SimpleRuleExtractor for MVP, LLMExtractor reserved for future). Manages the intent chain lifecycle: creation, refinement, drift-response linking.

interfaces.name: extract_intent
interfaces.api_detail: Uses the configured IntentExtractor strategy. MVP: SimpleRuleExtractor extracts first sentence or imperative clause from prompt. Creates IntentSnapshot with trigger='initial' if first for task, 'auto_inferred' otherwise.

interfaces.name: refine_intent
interfaces.api_detail: Appends new IntentSnapshot to the chain. If trigger is 'drift_response', expects a preceding DriftMarker on the active branch.

interfaces.name: detect_scope_change
interfaces.api_detail: MVP heuristic: scope change detected when current_file_set contains 2+ files not in previous_file_set, or files span a new directory not previously touched. Returns a summary of the change for auto_inferred intent.

interfaces.name: intent.created
interfaces.api_detail: Emitted via Tauri event system when a new IntentSnapshot is created (any trigger type).

nfr_constraints.performance: Intent extraction (SimpleRuleExtractor) must complete in < 50ms. No network calls in MVP.
nfr_constraints.security: Prompt text is processed in-memory only. Stored IntentSnapshot contains the extracted statement, not the full prompt.
nfr_constraints.other: Strategy Pattern: IntentExtractor trait with extract(prompt: &str) -> Result<String>. SimpleRuleExtractor implements regex-based extraction. LLMExtractor (future) would implement the same trait with an HTTP client.
